say hello

Mobile App Developer · Flutter & React Native · Denpasar, Bali

Hi, I'm Nathania. I build mobile apps that make it to the store, and stay there.

For the past five years I've been building cross-platform apps, from the first commit all the way to the App Store and Google Play, and the quieter work of keeping them healthy afterwards. I've worked on marketplaces, booking systems, fintech tools and subscription apps, sometimes starting from a blank repo and sometimes stepping into a codebase that just needed some care.

I like clean, maintainable code, UI that matches the design it came from, and working with people who care about what they ship. This page is both my resume and my portfolio, so feel free to scroll, or jump straight to the work.

5 years shipping mobile apps 9+ production apps contributed to 5 led from development to delivery

Experience

Where I've worked

A short version of my journey so far. Most of these roles connect to a project you can see in detail further down.

Dec 2025 – Present
Remote

Flutter Developer

Run 3033 AS

I develop and maintain features on a running-program app using Flutter with Provider for state management. I built the full in-app purchase and subscription flow with RevenueCat on both iOS and Android, added Google and Apple Sign-In, integrated the Facebook SDK for event tracking and attribution, and work with Firebase for real-time data and push notifications. See Run 3033 below.

Nov 2024 – Apr 2026
Remote

Flutter Engineer

Villey Pty Ltd

I built and shipped new features for a production-grade Flutter marketplace, refactoring legacy code along the way to keep it fast and maintainable. I managed state and navigation with GetX, integrated Supabase for auth, database and realtime updates, and Firebase for analytics, push and live events. I also did a lot of hands-on testing and debugging, and grew through code reviews and architecture discussions with senior engineers. See Villey below.

May 2021 – Oct 2024
Denpasar, Bali

Mobile Front-end Developer

PT Timedoor Indonesia

This is where I started, first as a React Native and QA intern, then as a full developer. Over three and a half years I contributed to 9+ projects across very different categories: reservation systems, a recipe platform, marketplaces, social networking apps and internal business tools, in both React Native and Flutter. Along the way I integrated REST APIs and third-party services, built real-time chat and push notifications with Firebase, and implemented in-app purchases on both platforms. Two of those projects, Digital Home Credit and TM Square, are shown below.

2024
Freelance

UI Implementation (3-week engagement)

Parable: Bible Chat & Guide

A short, focused freelance contract rebuilding the Home experience of a live app to a pixel-perfect spec. Small in scope, but a nice measure of how precisely I translate design into UI. See Parable below.

Portfolio

Selected work

Five projects I'm proud of, with real screenshots. The list below jumps to each one.

01 Digital Home Credit 02 TM Square 03 Villey 04 Run 3033 05 Parable

01 · PT Timedoor Indonesia · Client project

Digital Home Credit

React Native

Mobile front-end developer

A sales and home-credit management app for a retail network. Sales teams create credit orders, search and filter the product catalogue, manage carts, and submit applications with KTP/KK document capture and digital signatures. Supervisors track orders in real time through visual dashboards and manage their full team hierarchy, from downline levels to sales values and commissions, in one place.

Built with React Native · REST API · charts & dashboards · digital signature · document capture · multi-level network

Internal business tool. Imagery from the agency project showcase.

02 · PT Timedoor Indonesia · Live on iOS & Android

TM Square App

React Native

Lead developer through v1 release · built ~80% of the app

A sports facility app for TM Square Batam: court booking for badminton, basketball and pickleball with date, time-slot and court selection, plus coach booking, community events and memberships. I carried the app from early development through its initial App Store release; the live version has since received minor visual updates from the current team.

Built with React Native · booking flows · auth & guest mode · payments · push notifications

App Store ↗Google Play ↗

03 · Villey Pty Ltd · Nov 2024 – Apr 2026 · Live on iOS & Android

Villey: Your Instant Village

Flutter

Flutter engineer · built, maintained & shipped major new features on the production app

A two-sided marketplace connecting Australian families with verified local helpers. I built, maintained and shipped new features across the production Flutter app, refactoring legacy code along the way: helper discovery with list and Google Maps views, in-app chat with structured work-arrangement offers, secure bookings with a recurring scheduler, and the helper-side timesheet and payment-request flow, backed by Supabase and Firebase for auth, realtime data, analytics and push.

Built with Flutter · GetX · Supabase · Firebase · Google Maps · in-app chat · payments

App Store ↗Google Play ↗villey.co ↗

04 · Run 3033 AS · Dec 2025 – Present · Live on iOS & Android

Run 3033

Flutter

Flutter developer · in-app purchases, social auth & new features

A 12-week running program for beginners: 30 minutes, 3 times a week, for 3 months, with adaptive sessions, coach videos and meal plans. Joining the app's existing production codebase, I implemented the full in-app purchase and subscription flow with RevenueCat on iOS and Android, covering the free trial, weekly and one-time plans, and restore purchases, plus Google and Apple Sign-In, Facebook SDK event tracking, and ongoing feature development with Provider and Firebase.

Built with Flutter · Provider · RevenueCat · in-app purchases · Google & Apple Sign-In · Facebook SDK · Firebase

App Store ↗Google Play ↗

05 · Freelance · 3-week UI engagement · Live on iOS & Android

Parable: Bible Chat & Guide

UI implementation

Pixel-perfect UI rebuild of the Home experience and daily flow

An AI-guided Bible study app. In a focused three-week contract I rebuilt the Home screen and the connected daily journey (Message, Verse, Prayer and Challenge) to a pixel-perfect spec, including the synced read-along audio views, streak celebrations and the chat surface. A short engagement, but a good measure of how precisely I translate design into UI.

Built with pixel-perfect UI · design-to-code · audio read-along views · animations

App Store ↗Google Play ↗

2021 – 2024 · PT Timedoor Indonesia

Education

Contact

Have an app in mind, or one that needs a little care?

I'd love to hear about it. I'm comfortable starting from a blank repo or stepping into an existing production codebase. Based in Denpasar, Bali, working remotely worldwide. Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia.
